folio.label: 33v
folio.l: ¢ There nys nomore to sey , but West and Est

note.notetxt: 1743 There is a No next to the paragraph mark.Est

folio.l: In gon the speres , ful sadly in the rest
In gotú the sharp spore , in to the syde
ìäe se men who can Iuste , and who can ryde
They sheueren shaftes , vp on sheldes thikke
He feleth æorugú the hert spone , the prikke
Vp springen speres , xx é fote on heigút
Ou©t gon the swerdes , as the siluer brigút
The helmes they to hewen , and to shrede
Ou©t brest the blod , w sterne stremes rede
With mygúty maces , to bons they , to brest
He æorugú the thikkest , of the throng gan threst
There stomblen steedes strong , & doun gotú al
He rolletú vnder fote , as doth a bal
He foyneth on his fet , with his trounchou~
And he hi~ hurtetú , with his hors a doun~
He thurgú the body is hirt , and sithen take
Maugre his hede , and brou©t vn to the stake
As forward was , and æäe he must a byde
A nother lad is , on æat other syde
And som tyme , doth Theseus , to reste
Hem , to refresshe , & drynken if hem liste

note.notetxt: 1764after this line the ink becomes again lighter brown. This change of ink seems quite clear. Moreover the first three lines seem to have been written with the same lighter brown inkODR

folio.l: ¢ Ful ofte a day , han theise Thebans two
To geder mette , and wrougút his felawe woo
Vnhorsed hath ecú other , of hem tweye
There nas no Tygre , in the vale of Galgopheye
Whan æ hire whelp were stole , whan it is lite
So cruel on the hunte , as is Arcite
For ielous hert , vp on this Palamou~
Ne in belmarie , there nys so fel lyou~
That hunted is , or for his honger wood
Ne of his pray , desireth so the blod
As Palamou~ , to slen his foo Arcite
The ielous stokesstrokesstrokes , on here helmes byte
Ou©t renneth blod , on bothe here sides rede
¢ Somtyme an ende æäe is , of euäy dede
For er the sonne , vn to the rest went
The strong kyng , Emetrius , gan hent
This Palamou~ , as he faugút with Arcite
And mad his swerd depe , in his flessú to byte
And by the force of xx é , is he take
Vn©olden , and I drawen , vn to the stake
And in the rescuys , of æisæis Palamou~ ,
The strong kyng lygurge , is born a doun
And kyng Emetrius , for al his strengthe

note.notetxt: 1787the last three lines were written in a smaller size and compacted at the end. It seems that those lines had to fit in, probably because he was writing a bit larger one the folio, or for copying reasons he had to fit them in . In the right margin, just on the ruling line of the frame, there is an erased word, perhaps stages/pages: double checkODR
